<!-- Generated by prd-task-planner. Ephemeral ‚Äî regenerated each run. -->
# Shared Project Context

## Tech Stack
- TypeScript 5.x, Node.js 20, CommonJS modules (no `"type": "module"`)
- `whatsapp-web.js` for WhatsApp connectivity, `LocalAuth({ dataPath: 'data/session/' })` for session persistence
- `tsx` for dev-time execution (`npm start`, `npm run setup`), `tsc` for `npm run build`
- `claude` CLI binary on PATH ‚Äî invoked as a child process, prompt via stdin
- `qrcode-terminal` for QR code display in terminal

## Test Infrastructure
- **Framework**: Vitest
- **Test command**: `npm test` (runs `vitest run`); `npm run test:watch` (runs `vitest`)
- **File conventions**: `src/**/*.test.ts` co-located with source files
- **TDD applies to**: `prompts.ts`, `claude.ts`, `extract.ts`, pure helpers in `index.ts` and `whatsapp.ts`
- **TDD does NOT apply to**: scaffolding, `setup.ts` and `index.ts` orchestration (main() functions)

## Conventions
- All source in `src/`; compiled output to `dist/` (only used for `npm run build`)
- `import` syntax throughout TypeScript source (compiled to CJS by tsc)
- Pure functions in `extract.ts` accept generic typed arrays ‚Äî no WhatsApp client import at module level
- Entry points call `process.exit()` explicitly; library modules never call `process.exit()`
- `ownerId` resolved at startup: `process.env.OWNER_ID` overrides auto-detected `client.info.wid._serialized`
- Template placeholders use single-brace uppercase: `{KEY}` ‚Äî NOT `{{key}}`
- `data/` directory holds runtime artifacts: `data/voice_profile.md` and `data/session/`
- Rate limit for runtime mentions: 10 seconds per group (not 60)

## Key Files
| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `src/prompts.ts` | `META_PROMPT`, `RUNTIME_PROMPT` string constants and `fillTemplate()` helper (single-brace `{KEY}` placeholders) |
| `src/claude.ts` | `callClaude(prompt)` ‚Äî spawns `claude` CLI, always uses stdin, 60s timeout |
| `src/extract.ts` | `filterMessages()`, `stratifiedSampleByChat()`, `shuffle()`, `checkMinimumVolume()`, `formatMessagesForPrompt()` ‚Äî pure functions |
| `src/whatsapp.ts` | `createClient()`, `waitForReady()`, `fetchAllChats()`, `fetchGroupChats()`, `fetchMessages()`, `formatMessageLine()`, `formatRawMessage()`, owner info helpers |
| `src/setup.ts` | Setup entry point ‚Äî scrapes ALL chats (groups+DMs), calls Claude, writes `data/voice_profile.md` |
| `src/index.ts` | Runtime entry point ‚Äî `message_create` handler, rate limiter (10s), mention detection, before/after context window |
| `data/voice_profile.md` | Generated by setup; read by runtime; gitignored |
| `tasks/main/updated-prd.md` | Full codebase-aware PRD with all architectural decisions |
